name: Fresh Cherry Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 pint pitted sweet or sour cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir shortening until creamy.
2. Beat in sugar, egg yolk, and vanilla.
3. Sift together dry ingredients; add alternately to the first mixture with milk.
4. Fold in egg white, whipped stiff.
5. Mix cherries with additional 1/2 cup sugar.
6. Transfer to an oiled shallow 8-inch square pan.
7. Pour over batter, spreading mixture higher at edges than center.
8. Bake for 35 minutes in a moderate (375°F) oven. Serve with or without additional stewed cherries, cherry sauce, or whipped cream cheese.
